narrative: Section title + 2 term entities (surface+definition each, jp/zh/en). Translations of '経営組織' (Management Organization / 经营组织) and '組織形態' (Organizational Form / 组织形态) are semantically faithful, terminologically standard, and naturally phrased. JP definitions are tautological by source design and translations preserve that without adding meaning. No marker convention concerns (no question entities).
